I am a Data Engineer with eight years designing and operating large-scale data infrastructure for analytics and machine learning platforms. My pipeline work spans the full ELT/ETL spectrum — from streaming ingestion through Apache Kafka to batch transformation with Apache Spark and dbt, and final serving into Snowflake and BigQuery data warehouse layers.

I architect data lake solutions on S3 and GCS using open table formats (Delta Lake, Iceberg) with carefully designed partitioning strategies that keep query costs predictable. My dimensional modeling work follows Kimball principles, producing conformed star schemas with well-documented lineage tracked through data catalog integrations.

Orchestration is handled with Apache Airflow — I design DAG dependency graphs, implement retry logic and SLA alerting, and enforce data quality checks as first-class pipeline gates rather than after-the-fact audits. I write pipeline transformation logic in Python and SQL, and govern dbt model lineage with full documentation and testing coverage. I have delivered observability dashboards that expose pipeline health, partition stats, and freshness SLAs to data consumers across the organization.
